hero.description: We design and develop custom web and mobile applications to propel your business towards success.

services.title: Custom digital solutions
services.description: From design to production, we support you at every stage of your digital project with an agile approach.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Modern, performant and responsive websites and web applications.

mobile.description: Native and cross-platform applications for iOS and Android.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Robust architectures and secure APIs for your applications.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: AI solutions integration to automate and optimize your processes.

consulting.description: Support in defining and specifying your needs.

deploy.title: Deployment & DevOps
deploy.description: Production deployment and maintenance of your applications.

services.techDescription: A modern and proven tech stack

realisations.title: Our Work
realisations.description: Discover some of our projects that demonstrate our expertise and commitment to excellence.

project1.title: Le Béret Rouge
project1.description: Elegant showcase website for a French company. Modern, responsive design optimized for SEO.

project2.title: Ojami
project2.description: Modern web application with React JS frontend and secure Java Spring Boot backend. PostgreSQL database and robust architecture.

project3.title: Avrankou Municipality
project3.description: Official website of Avrankou municipality. Modern interface to inform citizens and promote the region.

project4.title: Afroverse
project4.description: Pan-Africanist cultural platform powered by GriotIA — the African heritage AI. History, civilisations and knowledge sourced from UNESCO and diaspora-founded media.

project5.title: Vases d'Honneur
project5.description: Official app of Assemblée De Grâce church. Centralise your spiritual and community life: daily verse, sermons, worship calendar, event registration and pastoral appointments — wherever you are.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quickly find answers to your questions. If you can't find what you're looking for, don't hesitate to contact us.
faq.contactDescription: Our team is here to help you

questions.q1: What types of projects do you work on?
questions.a1: We develop websites, mobile applications, backend systems and AI solutions. From showcase sites to complex applications.
questions.a2: Java/Spring Boot, React/Next.js, React Native, Python, and cloud tools like AWS, Docker, Vercel.
questions.a3: Needs analysis, technical proposal, agile sprint development, testing and production deployment with follow-up.
questions.a4: From 2-4 weeks for a showcase site to several months for a complex application. We establish a precise schedule.
questions.a5: Yes, we offer maintenance contracts including updates, fixes and technical support.
questions.a6: Via our contact form or by email. We analyze your needs and send you a proposal within 48h.

contact.title: Let's discuss your project
contact.description: Ready to transform your ideas into reality? Contact us to discuss your project and get a personalized quote.
